title: Pleasing Greek Phyllo Pie
description: A yeasty, gooey phyllo pie with bright orange zest and a sweet maple deglaze, all without eggs for a comforting dessert.
instructions: In a small saucepan, combine maple syrup, orange juice, and granulated sugar, then heat until the sugar dissolves, creating a sweet deglaze; cool slightly.
In a bowl, whisk almond milk, flour, baking powder, salt, and dried oregano until smooth.
Add the cooled deglaze and orange zest to the batter, stirring until well incorporated.
Lay two phyllo sheets in the bottom of a greased 9-inch square baking dish, brushing each sheet with melted vegan butter and olive oil.
Repeat the layering of phyllo sheets and butter/olive oil until you have 10 sheets, spooning a thin layer of batter over each sheet.
Tuck the remaining phyllo sheets on top, brushing them with more butter and oil, and gently press to seal.
Bake the pie for 30 minutes, or until the phyllo is golden brown and puffed.
Remove from the oven and let the pie cool for 10 minutes before slicing.
Serve warm, optionally dusted with powdered sugar or a drizzle of extra maple syrup.
